lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, blemishes are removed.
The Blessed Vision of their Darshan brings a sublime, happy peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਫਲ ਜਨੰਮ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak saadh kai sang safal janam |5|
lines.english: O Nanak, in the Company of the Holy, one's life becomes fruitful. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨਹੀ ਕਛੁ ਘਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang nahee kachh ghaal |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, there is no suffering.
In the Company of the Holy, hell is far away.
In the Company of the Holy, the separated ones are reunited with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਈਹਾ ਊਹਾ ਸੁਹੇਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang eehaa aoohaa suhelaa |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, one is happy here and hereafter.
The fruits of one's desires are obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang na birathaa jaavai |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, no one goes empty-handed.
O Nanak, listening to the sweet words of the Holy, one is saved. ||6||
The Supreme Lord God dwells in the hearts of the Holy.
In the Company of the Holy, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੁਨਉ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang sunau har naau |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, listen to the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਬਿਸਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang na man te bisarai |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, do not forget Him from your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਡੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo kai sang ghatt ghatt ddeetthaa |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, He is seen in each and every heart.
In the Company of the Holy, you shall surely be saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਲਗੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang lagai prabh meetthaa |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, God seems very sweet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਟੇ ਸਭਿ ਰੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang mitte sabh rog |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, all diseases are cured.
In the Company of the Holy, we obtain the state of salvation.
In the Company of the Holy, we become obedient to the Lord.
O Nanak, one meets with the Holy, by highest destiny. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੀ ਉਪਮਾ ਤਿਹੁ ਗੁਣ ਤੇ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kee upamaa tihu gun te door |
lines.english: The greatness of the Holy people is beyond the three qualities.
They can describe only what they have heard.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਬੇਦ ਨ ਜਾਨਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kee mahimaa bed na jaaneh |
lines.english: The glory of the Holy people is not known to the Vedas.
The glory of the Holy people is infinite and eternal.
The greatness of the Holy people is all-pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਕਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਅੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kee sobhaa kaa naahee ant |
lines.english: The glory of the Holy people has no limit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਊਚ ਤੇ ਊਚੀ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kee sobhaa aooch te aoochee |
lines.english: The glory of the Holy people is the highest of the high.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਸਾਧ ਬਨਿ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kee sobhaa saadh ban aaee |
lines.english: The glory of the Holy people is theirs alone;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਮੂਚ ਤੇ ਮੂਚੀ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kee sobhaa mooch te moochee |
lines.english: The glory of the Holy people is the greatest of the great.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭੇਦੁ ਨ ਭਾਈ ॥੮॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak saadh prabh bhed na bhaaee |8|7|
lines.english: O Nanak, there is no difference between the Holy people and God. ||8||7||
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਪੇਖੈ ਏਕਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: avar na pekhai ekas bin koe |
lines.english: He sees only the One.
The True One is on his mind, and the True One is upon his lips.
as the lotus in the water remains detached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਇਹ ਲਛਣ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ih lachhan braham giaanee hoe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, these are the qualities of the God-conscious being. ||1||
Ashtapadee:
The God-conscious being is always unattached,
The God-conscious being looks upon all alike,
The God-conscious being is always unstained,
like the sun, which gives its comfort and warmth to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੇ ਰਾਜ ਰੰਕ ਕਉ ਲਾਗੈ ਤੁਲਿ ਪਵਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: jaise raaj rank kau laagai tul pavaan |
lines.english: like the wind, which blows equally upon the king and the poor beggar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਬਸੁਧਾ ਕੋਊ ਖੋਦੈ ਕੋਊ ਚੰਦਨ ਲੇਪ ॥
lines.translit: jiau basudhaa koaoo khodai koaoo chandan lep |
lines.english: like the earth, which is dug up by one, and anointed with sandal paste by another.
The God-conscious being has a steady patience,
This is the quality of the God-conscious being:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਉ ਪਾਵਕ ਕਾ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਭਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jiau paavak kaa sehaj subhaau |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, his inherent nature is like a warming fire. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਹੋਇ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kai man hoe pragaas |
lines.english: The God-conscious being's mind is enlightened,
filth does not stick to water.
The God-conscious being is the purest of the pure;

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕੈ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਸਤ੍ਰੁ ਸਮਾਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kai mitr satru samaan |
lines.english: To the God-conscious being, friend and foe are the same.
like the sky above the earth.
The God-conscious being has no egotistical pride.
They alone become God-conscious beings,
O Nanak, whom God Himself makes so. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਅਪਨੈ ਹੈ ਸਭ ਤੇ ਨੀਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: man apanai hai sabh te neechaa |
lines.english: Within his own mind, he is the most humble of all.
The God-conscious being is the highest of the high.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕੀ ਸਭ ਊਪਰਿ ਮਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kee sabh aoopar meaa |
lines.english: The God-conscious being shows kindness to all.
The God-conscious being is the dust of all.
The God-conscious being knows the nature of the soul.
The God-conscious being is always impartial.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਤੇ ਕਛੁ ਬੁਰਾ ਨ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee te kachh buraa na bheaa |
lines.english: No evil comes from the God-conscious being.
